sentences.arabic: كَانَ وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ إِبْرَاهِيمُ لَا يُحِبُّ الِاسْتِيقَاظَ بَاكِرًا.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Ibrahim koji nije volio rano ustajanje.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Ibrahim who did not like waking up early.

sentences.arabic: تَأَخَّرَ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ عَنِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ وَفَاتَهُ الِامْتِحَانُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je zakasnio u školu i propustio ispit.
sentences.translationEn: One day he was late for school and missed the exam.

sentences.arabic: حَزِنَ كَثِيرًا وَقَرَّرَ أَنْ يَضَعَ مُنَبِّهَيْنِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jako se rastuži i odlučio je svake večeri namjestiti dva alarma.
sentences.translationEn: He was very sad and decided to set two alarms every night.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ لَمْ يَتَأَخَّرْ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Od tog dana više nikad nije zakasnio.
sentences.translationEn: From that day he was never late again.
